title: vgrav: Vertical gravitational potential of the Milky Way as a multi-model benchmark
description: Reproducibility package for 'Vertical gravitational potential of the Milky Way as a multi-model benchmark' (Wang et al. 2026). Tests 11 gravity models (CDM NFW/Einasto, QUMOND, STVG, f(R) screened, Refracted Gravity, Emergent Gravity, HMG anisotropic) against Wang+2026 rotation-curve and vertical-potential data. Includes the vgrav Python library, pre-computed outputs, and step-by-step reproduction scripts.
